category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a USB 2.0 protocol analysis application for Cynthion; official README describes the same purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is packetry; official GitHub README heading is Packetry.
docs_sources: Official Packetry README links to the latest Packetry Documentation on Read the Docs and also includes build/run notes.
